p.em: Intel Manual Quality Specification — Byte-Aligned Layout

ol.li: eBPF Ingress: Events trapped via kprobe/sys_enter.
BPF Map Storage: Data held in per-CPU hash/array maps.
Summation: Userspace iterates all online CPUs, performs atomic sum into dashboard_state_t.
UI Update: Ncurses thread renders the aggregated struct.
